sqlMap.select: select * from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey TaxAttorneyName NumberOfYrOfTaxExp PercentOfTimeDevoted IsCertifiedTax LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #TaxAttorneyName# #NumberOfYrOfTaxExp# #PercentOfTimeDevoted# #IsCertifiedTax# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey, TaxAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfTaxExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, IsCertifiedTax, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey = #AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW set
TaxAttorneyName = #TaxAttorneyName# TaxAttorneyName = null NumberOfYrOfTaxExp = #NumberOfYrOfTaxExp# NumberOfYrOfTaxExp = null PercentOfTimeDevoted = #PercentOfTimeDevoted# PercentOfTimeDevoted = null IsCertifiedTax = #IsCertifiedTax# IsCertifiedTax = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey = #AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey = #AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey, TaxAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfTaxExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, IsCertifiedTax, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey = #AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AttorneyHaveTaxWorkKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, TaxAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfTaxExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, IsCertifiedTax, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyHaveTaxWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
